hero.subtitle: Social prediction markets where your calls earn real yield. Stake your conviction, compete on the leaderboard, and settle instantly on-chain.

step1.title: Make Your Call
step1.desc: Browse live markets or create your own prediction. Any token, any outcome. Put your conviction on the line.

step2.title: Stake & Compete
step2.desc: Back your call with XLM or any supported token. Friends can back you or bet against you — social markets at its finest.

step3.title: Win & Earn
step3.desc: Markets settle instantly on-chain. Winners claim rewards automatically. Your rep grows with every correct call.

multiChain.title: Multi-Chain
multiChain.desc: Trade across Stellar, Ethereum, Solana, and Avalanche from a single unified interface.

socialFeed.title: Social Feed
socialFeed.desc: Follow top predictors, copy calls, and build your reputation on the leaderboard.

instantSettlement.title: Instant Settlement
instantSettlement.desc: Soroban smart contracts settle markets in seconds. No waiting, no disputes.

reputationScore.title: Reputation Score
reputationScore.desc: Your track record is on-chain. Build credibility, unlock higher stake limits.

realYield.title: Real Yield
realYield.desc: Winning predictors earn from the losing side. No house cut — pure peer-to-peer.

createMarkets.title: Create Markets
createMarkets.desc: Anyone can launch a prediction market on any outcome. Permissionless and unstoppable.

cta.desc: Join thousands of predictors already earning on BACKit. Connect your wallet and make your first call in under 60 seconds.
cta.footnote: No account needed. Non-custodial. Your keys, your calls.
